subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and He Who hath come upon the clouds - verily He is the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی علی السحاب انه لهو العزیز الوهاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
